body:
Good morning, Alexandria friends!

Happy Hump day!

I hope you all have had a wonderful morning so far!

My muse has been a bit more active, but less about writing right now. Today I already have two brand spanking new memes queued up and posting later. I’ve added a new tag for these #alexandria meme which can be found here. I guess this is just a new area to play in for your friendly neighborhood goth trans girl shitposter!

(I was just looking at my message from yesterday and realized I must have taken “Remember to be the feral trans shitposter you want to see in the world today!” to heart, even though I forgot I said it, lol.)

I hope you all have a wonderful day! 🖤🖤🖤
